PreToolUse.hook: python -c "import sys, re; content=open(sys.argv[1]).read() if len(sys.argv)>1 else ''; patterns=[r'\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}', r'\b\d{9}\b']; matches=[p for p in patterns if re.search(p, content)]; sys.exit(1) if matches else sys.exit(0)"
python -c "import sys; path=sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else ''; sys.exit(1) if '/data/raw/' in path or '\\data\\raw\\' in path else sys.exit(0)"
PreToolUse.description: Warn before modifying files in data/raw/

PostToolUse.hook: echo 'File written: check outputs for accuracy'
